title: solidago nemoralis var. longipetiolata
intro: Solidago nemoralis var. longipetiolata, also known as the woodland goldenrod, is a variety of flowering plant in the aster family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Solidago nemoralis var. longipetiolata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used in infusions and salves.
